message:
fix(packs): add external pack loading to batch, scan, and simulate modes

Three evaluation code paths were missing external pack loading from
custom_paths, causing custom security rules to be silently ignored:

- Batch mode (run_hook_command): had a TODO placeholder
- Scan mode (ScanEvalContext::from_config): only loaded built-in packs
- Simulate mode (run_simulation): only loaded built-in packs

All three now mirror the exact external pack loading pattern from
test_command() and handle_explain(): load packs, merge keywords,
disable keyword index when external packs are present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
